selection_rule: fresh source-file rotation; train neural expected-FDE/risk models on train; select policy on validation only; test once; no test threshold tuning

split_report.description: Fresh source-file rotation split for confirming the domain-safe relaxed Stage41 neural signal without reusing the same held-out files.

overlap_audit.scene_overlap_note: TrajNet scene_id is coarse, so scene overlap can remain even with source-file held-out rotation; source-file overlap is the strict confirmation no-leakage check.

no_leakage.unused_duplicate_source: TrajNet/Train/crowds/crowds_zara03.txt is unused to avoid UCY zara03 duplicate leakage.

train.resume_note: checkpoint and heartbeat verified; skipped retraining
checkpoint and heartbeat verified; skipped retraining
checkpoint and heartbeat verified; skipped retraining

caveat: This is a source-rotation confirmation on existing external datasets, not a new dataset. UCY independent rotation is limited by duplicated zara03 files and only two unique UCY scenes. The fresh run confirms all/hard neural lift but does not fully replace Stage37 because t50 remains below Stage37 and the candidate-oracle t50 ceiling is also below Stage37 on this rotation.
